headline: 5 Medical Supply Stocks to Buy Amid Strong Industry Tailwinds
summary: Here, we highlight five dental supplies stocks, MCK, CAH, WST, ALGN and HSIC, which are well positioned to generate wealth for investors amid improving industry prospect.

headline: BNP Paribas Initiates Coverage On West Pharmaceutical Servs with Outperform Rating, Announces Price Target of $447
summary: BNP Paribas  analyst Curtis Moiles   initiates coverage on West Pharmaceutical Servs (NYSE:WST) with a Outperform rating and announces Price Target of $447.

headline: Alcon & RxSight Collaborate to Develop Adjustable PCIOL Technology
summary: ALC is developing adjustable presbyopia-correcting lenses that pair advanced optics with post-surgery light adjustment.
